prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on pyridine (11 atoms: N, C×5, H×5) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-centre integrals (no density fitting). Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz, used as-is (single point — not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported.

Results:
- HOMO (index 20): −7.2525992 eV
- LUMO (index 21): −1.112786 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 6.1398131 eV (Koopmans-style orbital energy difference)
- Total electronic energy: −248.3782 Hartree (−6758.7152 eV)

Integrity: trustworthy = true, status = ok.

CLI: cli.py frontier pyridine.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
Output JSON: pyridine_frontier_dft.json
